purpose: Web page with JavaScript-driven Conway's Game of Life on a resizable window.

project.preferences: Keep everything for a given page embedded in that page. All code (HTML, CSS, JS) for the game goes in TheGameOfLife.html. Multiple pages may exist later, but each page is self-contained.
project.constraints: Do not commit, delete, or access content outside the workspace without explicit approval.

currentPosition.focus: TheGameOfLife.html — 14 declarative patterns, hover display, actual gen/s timing, LTeX disabled
currentPosition.nextStep: Review patterns in browser; consider further pattern additions or UI polish

lastActions: Completed PATTERN_DEFS declarative refactor (added dropdown population JS)
Reformatted PATTERN_DEFS to one key-value pair per line
Added LTeX disable comment to suppress spell-check highlights
Added Acorn Wide pattern (Acorn rotated 90° clockwise, originOffset [-20, 32])

decisions.decision: All code for a given page is embedded in that page (no external JS/CSS files).
Milestone 1 includes a working single-file Conway's Game of Life implementation with embedded UI, styling, and simulation logic.

nextActions: Paste the raw conversation transcript into Conversations/Chat_2026-05-02.txt
Run a sensitive-information scan after the transcript is pasted (repository is public)

conflictCheckProtocol.blockingRule: If conflicts exist, wait for user approval before proceeding.

reminderBehavior.format: Reminder: <task>. (I did not perform this task.)
